topic: Gas receipts appear in my car from a station that closed twenty years ago.
title: Gas Receipts From A Station Closed Twenty Years Ago | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Gas receipts kept appearing in my car from a station that closed twenty years ago.
scenes.image_prompt: a curled paper gas receipt resting on a car dashboard, faded print, dim morning light, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I found them in the cup holder each morning.
scenes.image_prompt: a car cup holder with a crumpled receipt inside, dim cabin, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Same station name. Same blurred logo.
scenes.image_prompt: a close composition of a faded gas receipt with smudged lettering, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The dates printed on them were always last night.
scenes.image_prompt: a fresh receipt held in a hand showing a recent timestamp, dim car interior, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But that station burned down in two thousand four.
scenes.image_prompt: an abandoned overgrown gas station ruin at dusk, broken pumps, fog, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My fuel gauge sat full every single morning.
scenes.image_prompt: a car fuel gauge needle pinned at full in a dim dashboard, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I drove out to the old station at night.
scenes.image_prompt: a car approaching a dark derelict gas station, headlights on cracked pavement, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The pumps were rusted shut. But one light flickered on.
scenes.image_prompt: a single flickering canopy light over a rusted abandoned fuel pump, deep shadow, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: A receipt printed itself from the dead machine.
scenes.image_prompt: a thin paper strip emerging from a rusted gas pump slot, dim flickering light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It listed my license plate and the words, see you tonight.
scenes.image_prompt: a freshly printed receipt held in a hand with faint typed lettering, dark station behind, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I never went back. The receipts kept coming anyway.
scenes.image_prompt: a small pile of curled receipts on a car passenger seat, dim dawn light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night's receipt was signed in my own handwriting.
scenes.image_prompt: a receipt with a looping handwritten signature at the bottom, resting on a dark dashboard, low light, vertical 9:16 framing
